case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TIMOTHY CHEE et al

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEE, TIMOTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 711 PACIFIC AVENUE #115, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94133, **INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
